etymology.description: 㔾 is a variant form of 節 (節) (jié, "joint") -> Phono-semantic compound: bamboo ⺮ ("bamboo") + phonetic 即 (ji, "approach")
etymology.interpretation: 㔾 itself does not provide a distinct etymological structure, as it is considered a variant of 節, which conveys a segment or joint of bamboo due to the combination of its phonetic and semantic components.
